en.extract:
The Sumba green pigeon (Treron teysmannii) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Sumba Island in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Sumba green pigeon''' ('''''Treron teysmannii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Columbidae]]. It is [[endemic]] to [[Sumba Island]] in Indonesia. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
